failures.test: Command Palette (⌘K) › navigating via palette adds item to recent items
failures.hypothesis: Test uses banned pattern waitForLoadState('networkidle') causing timeout. The navigation completes but network never goes idle due to polling/websocket connections.
failures.suggested_fix: Replace waitForLoadState('networkidle') at line 82 with waitForSelector for the expected UI element (e.g., recent items section or specific palette content)
